text: Being here, I am enveloped by the modernity of the space—the clean white walls, the glass partitions, the sense of curated order. Entering the exhibition labeled 'R+D,' I am prompted to reflect on the intersection of research, technology, and human experience. The bold colors, interactive displays, and thoughtful messages conjure a sense of curiosity mingled with quiet contemplation. I am both an observer and a subject, aware of the ways knowledge and environment shape perception. The sterile clarity and the promise of new ideas pull me into a meditative state, pondering how technology not only augments our cognitive reach but also asks us to reconsider our role in an ever-evolving world.
